ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Petition For Letters Of Administration
Off Calendar Jun-30-2020 Continued To Jul-14-20 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Sil Liapis for Kevin Williams.

Mr. Liapis stated that a petition to transfer has been e-filed. The Petition for Letters of Administration is continued to July 14, 2020 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 and will then be continued to the hearing date that is given to the petition to transfer venue.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: J. Reyes. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Petition For Letters Of Administration
Off Calendar Apr-01-2020 Continued To Jun-30-20 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Petition For Letters Of Administration
Off Calendar Feb-05-2020 Continued To Apr-01-20 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Lindsey Pace for and with Kevin Williams (Administrator).

Ms. Pace requested a 30-day continuance stating that they just came in to the case, that they are attempting to go through the files and that there are IOLTA accounts (attorney client trust accounts) to figure out. The Court reminds Counsel that Probate Examiner's notes were issued and need to be addressed, and noted that there is an issue of venue. Mr. Williams stated that the Decedent lived in Fairburn, Georgia and that she practiced in San Francisco and in Alameda County. The Petition for Letters of Administration is continued to April 1, 2020 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Tauscher. Not reported.
